X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaṭīkā/Brahmajālasutta/.text: Yathā evaṁ byākhoti-ādīsu, na pana ākāravisesavācako ca. (Ka) So Abhinavaṭīkāya sameti.
Dī 1. 166; Dī 2. 126; Saṁ 2. 61; Ma 1. 48; Vi 4. 489 piṭṭhesu.
Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 257; Dī-Ṭṭha 3. 61; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 289; Udāna-Ṭṭha 305; Apadāna-Ṭṭha 2. 91; Cariyāpiṭaka-Ṭṭha 9. 324; Buddhavaṁsa-Ṭṭha 163 piṭṭhādīsu.
Ma 2. 146; Saṁ 1. 266; Aṁ 1. 52; Aṁ 3. 33; Khu 7. 379 piṭṭhesu.

Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 59; Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 47, 50; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 2. 265; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 80, 83; Buddhavaṁsa-Ṭṭha 18, 19; Udāna-Ṭṭha 112, 113; Paṭisaṁ-Ṭṭha 1, 190, 192; Theragāthā-Ṭṭha 1. 42; Itivuttaka-Ṭṭha 111, 112; Mahāniddesa-Ṭṭha 153, 155 piṭṭhesu.
Suttanipāta-Ṭṭha 1. 45 piṭṭhe, Visuddhi-Ṭṭha 1. 113 piṭṭhepi thokaṁ visadisaṁ.
Ma 1. 182; Vi 2. 175; Khu 7. 5, 15 piṭṭhādīsu. 4. Ma 1. 121, 128 piṭṭhādīsu.
Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 37; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 257 piṭṭhesu ca Jinālaṅkāraṭīkāya vijātamaṅgalavaṇṇanāyañca vitthāro.
Na katthaci vibhāgaṁ karoti, aññadatthu nirapekkho (Abhinavaṭī, Cariyāpiṭaka-Ṭṭha.)
Abhi-Ṭṭha 1. 72; Apadāna-Ṭṭha 1. 55; Jātaka-Tṭha 1. 53; Buddhavaṁsa-Ṭṭha 316; Cariyāpiṭaka-Ṭṭha 321 piṭṭhesu.
Khu 7. 278; Khu 8. 176; Khu 9. 376 piṭṭhehi adhippāyamattameva gahitaṁ viya dissati.
Khu 7. 139; Khu 8. 175; Khu 9. 376; Khu 10. 16 piṭṭhesu thokaṁ visadisaṁ.
Dī 2. 233; Ma 1. 72; Ma 3. 132; Saṁ 2. 329; Khu 1. 2 piṭṭhesu.
Vi 2. 189 piṭṭhe. 3. Vi 2. 460 piṭṭhe. 4. Vi 1. 263, 264; Vi 4. 359, 360 piṭṭhesu.

Na hi abhāvapakkhe paṭicittassa vināsaṁ passati. (bahūsu)

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaṭīkā/Brahmajālasutta/.text: Visuddhi-Ṭī 2. 217, 218; Anuṭī 2. 64, 65 piṭṭhesu passitabbaṁ. 3. Dī 1. 52 piṭṭhe.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaṭīkā/Sāmaññaphalasutt.text: Pothanikanti churikaṁ, yaṁ kharantipi (Sārattha-Ṭī 3. 414 piṭṭhe.) pothanikanti churikaṁ, kharantipi (Vimati-Ṭī 2. 253 piṭṭhe.)
Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 171 piṭṭhe, Visuddhi 2. 203; Paṭisaṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 322; Mahāniddesa-Ṭṭha 198 piṭṭhesupi.
Khu 1. 254; Aṁ 1. 343 piṭṭhesu. 2. Ma 1. 226; Ma 2. 293; Vi 3. 10 piṭṭhesu.

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaṭīkā/Ambaṭṭhasuttavaṇ.text: Sādī vuccati samasaṇṭhānaṁ, pokkharena sādī samasaṇṭhānāvayavo etassāti (?)
Sādī vuccati samasaṇṭhānaṁ, pokkharena sādī samasaṇṭhānāvayavo etassāti (?)

X/Sīlakkhandhavaggaṭīkā/Mahāsīhanādasutt.text: Āyatiṁ anantarabhavato tatiyaṁ upapatti, puna upapattīti punappunaṁ nibbattiṁ (?)
Āyatiṁ anantarabhavato tatiyaṁ upapatti, puna upapattīti punappunaṁ nibbattiṁ (?)
